name: Munters Group AB
description: Munters Group AB is a global leader in energy-efficient climate control and air treatment solutions for mission-critical processes. Founded in 1955, the company specializes in precise humidity, temperature, and air quality control for demanding industrial and agricultural applications. Serving sectors such as data centers, pharmaceuticals, battery production, and food processing, Munters leverages innovative technology, AI-powered software, and sustainable practices to optimize resource efficiency. Headquartered in Kista, Sweden, the company operates globally, providing tailored solutions that secure production quality while minimizing energy and water consumption to support a healthier planet.
